description: Scan prompt catalog. Core rules are inlined; reference snippets are listed for on-demand reading.

catalog.title: Pipeline
catalog.description: End-to-end scan sequence from load env through review, result write, and handoff.

catalog.title: Configuration model
catalog.description: Where workspace config lives and what must stay out of hardcoded prompts.

catalog.title: Workspace and worktrees
catalog.description: Worktree isolation, no direct repo edits, and no push/gh during the scan.

catalog.title: Review-only mode
catalog.description: Runtime profiles as safety labels; blocked install/build/test/lint commands.

catalog.title: Issue registry
catalog.description: Persistent finding registry path, statuses, and dedupe rules.

catalog.title: Error handling
catalog.description: Fail loudly but safely; how to record blockers without unsafe recovery.

catalog.description: Post-scan PR creation boundaries; what the agent must not push during the run.

catalog.title: Severity guideline
catalog.description: Official High/Medium/Low classification rules for every finding.

catalog.description: Required finding fields and when a High finding may get a local auto-fix commit.

catalog.description: scan-result.json schema and fields the wrapper fills after the agent exits.

catalog.description: How to redact credentials and keep sensitive values out of reports and PRs.
